completed_work: Added parseable JSON CLI tests for both provider scripts.
Verified real CLI smoke tests parse JSON successfully for both provider scripts.
key_decisions: Expose machine-readable provider context summaries through explicit --summary-format json.
Keep default --print-context-summary output as text for backward compatibility.
Use schema_version v1 and include resolved latest-context policy plus context budget preview.
next_actions: Run an AI-Lab provider comparison to choose the next smallest target, with Manual L0 chunk creation helper as the leading sequenced follow-up from SYNCOMP-0009.
risks: The JSON summary schema is now versioned as v1; future additions should be additive or versioned to avoid breaking consumers.
summary_text: AI-Lab added JSON output for provider latest-context dry-run summaries. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now support --summary-format json with --print-context-summary and --print-prompt, emitting a stable schema_version v1 payload containing the resolved latest-context policy and context budget preview. Default text output remains unchanged. Tests cover stable JSON formatting, parseable CLI output for both provider scripts, and gating that --summary-format json requires --print-context-summary. Full test suite passed with 216 tests, and smoke tests parsed JSON successfully for both CLIs.
